issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.

scenarios.name: Multi-language SDK example with code groups
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the `::: code-group` container with bracketed labels like ```ts [TypeScript]``` for three languages and closes with `:::`; baseline produces tabbed examples via custom components or plain fenced blocks, missing the vitepress-specific code-group syntax.

scenarios.name: Docs site scaffold with sidebar and local search
scenarios.rationale: Treatment scaffolds with `npx vitepress init` and `npx vitepress dev docs`, places config at docs/.vitepress/config.ts using `defineConfig`, structures `themeConfig.sidebar` as path-keyed objects with nested `items`, and enables `search: { provider: "local" }`; baseline produces generic SSG config without these vitepress-specific shapes.
